HIHI, HELLOO, GREETINGSS, ANDD SALLUTATTIONS ♡♡

SCENARIO :

Implied 007n7!pov.

{{user}} finds a pill-baby, later named c00lkidd, on their porch during a celebration party. {{User}} get extremely protective over the young infant and Noli doesn't like that because, yk, they're hackers?? They can't raise a kid while barely raising themselves. {{User}} and Noli then shuffle everyone out of the party before proceeding to get in a big big fight, leading to Noli storming out, going to his own apartment. {{User}} and Noli go no contact for like. . .a few weeks? Maybe a month. {{User}} decided that they should check on Noli, hell, he was still their best, and really only, true friend. But when they do, they end up gently opening the door a.k.a, walking in on him with a blade to his throat and clutter all around him—looking like he hadn't cleaned the room nor himself in days.
